meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Stop Deploying Manually with SaaS Starter Kits
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment bottlenecks. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship professional apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting infrastructure and start shipping. By utilizing a pre-configured SaaS starter kit, you eliminate deployment friction, environment drift, and configuration hell. When paired with Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you can automate your CI/CD pipeline and go from local code to production in minutes.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and your terminal is screaming error codes. You have the business logic down, but the deployment pipeline has become a monolithic wall between you and your paycheck. The 'I can't deploy' feeling is the silent killer of freelance careers, turning high-value developers into debugging janitors.

But what if deployment wasn't a separate task? What if your codebase came pre-wired for the cloud? By adopting a production-grade SaaS starter kit, you shift from manual configuration to automated deployment. It is time to stop reinventing the infrastructure wheel and start building the features that actually move the needle.

steps.title: Bootstrap with a Production-Ready Starter
steps.description: Select a starter kit that includes built-in CI/CD pipelines. This eliminates the need to manually configure Dockerfiles or GitHub Actions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the boilerplate that includes Next.js, Postgres, and pre-configured Vercel/Fly.io deployment targets.

steps.title: Architect the Database Schema
steps.description: Define your data models early to ensure your deployment environment matches your local development environment perfectly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including Users, Subscriptions, and Projects tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task='generate prisma schema and migration files'

steps.title: Configure Automated Environment Variables
steps.description: Deployment fails often due to missing ENV vars. Automate their injection during the build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that validates required environment variables against a template file before triggering the build process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task='add dotenv-check validation to package.json scripts'

steps.title: Implement Staging-to-Production Workflow
steps.description: Set up a preview environment so you can test deployments before they hit the live production URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project to automatically deploy a preview environment on every pull request using the Vercel CLI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task='setup github actions for preview deployments'

steps.title: Final Production Push
steps.description: Execute the final deployment sequence to verify the infrastructure is robust and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review deployment logs and optimize the build command for faster production deployment times.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task='trigger production build and verify health check'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Preview' environment for every feature branch to catch deployment bugs before they hit production.
Hard-code your infrastructure as code (IaC) within the starter kit to ensure environment parity across all client projects.
Use Claude Code to write automated smoke tests that run immediately after a deployment succeeds.
Keep your database migrations decoupled from the application code to prevent data loss during rapid deployment cycles.
Implement automated error tracking (like Sentry) in your starter kit; if a deployment breaks, you should know within seconds.
content.next_steps: After your first successful deployment, integrate a subscription payment gateway like Stripe to turn your starter kit into a revenue-generating machine.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on configuration and start scaling your freelance business with automated, professional-grade infrastructure. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
